title: Missing test-supervisor detail endpoints (/result/:round/:testId and /fix/:testId)
description:
Dashboard API missing two critical endpoints for test-loop observability:

1. GET /api/tests/result/:round/:testId - Should return specific round test results
2. GET /api/tests/fix/:testId - Should return fix details for a test

These endpoints are needed for detailed test inspection in the Test Lab UI. Currently returns 404 when queried.

Fixed by implementing fallback logic in test-reader service and enhancing route handler.
